title: Pitt, Tim - Director of Economic Policy, Prime Minister's Office, 10 Downing Street - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Pitt left his role at the Prime Minister’s Office, 10 Downing Street in May 2024  Head of UK Government Affairs, Bank of America  Mr Pitt sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Bank of America.  The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
